@Controller.description: Marks a class as a NestJS controller. Accepts an optional route path prefix or array of prefixes.

@Get.description: Routes HTTP GET requests to the decorated method. Accepts an optional route path.

@Post.description: Routes HTTP POST requests to the decorated method.

@Put.description: Routes HTTP PUT requests to the decorated method.

@Patch.description: Routes HTTP PATCH requests to the decorated method.

@Delete.description: Routes HTTP DELETE requests to the decorated method.

@Module.description: Marks a class as a NestJS module. Accepts metadata with imports, controllers, providers, and exports arrays.

@Injectable.description: Marks a class as a provider that can be managed by the NestJS IoC container.

@Inject.signature: function Inject(token?: string | symbol | Type): ParameterDecorator
@Inject.description: Injects a provider by token. Used for non-class-based provider injection.

@Optional.description: Marks a constructor parameter as optional. Prevents errors when the provider is not available.

@Body.description: Extracts the request body or a specific property from it.

@Param.description: Extracts a route parameter or all route parameters from the request.

@Query.description: Extracts query string parameters from the request URL.

@Headers.description: Extracts headers from the request. Optionally extracts a single named header.

@Req.description: Injects the underlying platform request object (e.g., Express Request).

@Res.description: Injects the underlying platform response object. Using @Res() disables NestJS standard response handling unless passthrough is true.

@HttpCode.description: Sets the HTTP response status code for the decorated route handler.

@Header.signature: function Header(name: string, value: string): MethodDecorator
@Header.description: Sets a custom response header for the decorated route handler.

@Redirect.signature: function Redirect(url?: string, statusCode?: number): MethodDecorator
@Redirect.description: Redirects the response to the given URL with an optional status code.

@Render.description: Renders a view template using the configured template engine.

@UseGuards.description: Binds guards to the scope of the controller or method. Guards determine whether a request is handled.

@UseInterceptors.description: Binds interceptors to the controller or method scope. Interceptors add extra logic before/after execution.

@UsePipes.description: Binds pipes to the controller or method scope. Pipes transform or validate input data.

@UseFilters.description: Binds exception filters to the controller or method scope.

@SetMetadata.signature: function SetMetadata(key: string, value: any): CustomDecorator
@SetMetadata.description: Attaches custom metadata to a route handler, accessible via Reflector.

@Catch.description: Marks a class as an exception filter for the given exception type(s).

@EventPattern.description: Subscribes to an event-based microservice pattern (fire-and-forget).

@MessagePattern.description: Subscribes to a request-response microservice message pattern.

@WebSocketGateway.description: Marks a class as a WebSocket gateway. Accepts optional port and namespace options.

@SubscribeMessage.description: Subscribes to a specific WebSocket message event.

@ConnectedSocket.description: Injects the connected client socket instance into a gateway method.

@WebSocketServer.description: Injects the underlying WebSocket server instance.

@Sse.description: Marks a method as a Server-Sent Events endpoint.

@Cron.signature: function Cron(cronTime: string | CronExpression, options?: CronOptions): MethodDecorator
@Cron.description: Schedules a method to run on a cron expression.

@Interval.description: Schedules a method to run at a fixed interval in milliseconds.

@Timeout.description: Schedules a method to run once after a timeout in milliseconds.

@ApiTags.description: Adds tags to Swagger documentation for grouping endpoints.

@ApiOperation.description: Describes an API operation for Swagger documentation.

@ApiResponse.description: Documents an API response status code and description for Swagger.

@ApiProperty.description: Decorates a DTO property for Swagger schema documentation.

@ApiBody.description: Describes the request body schema for Swagger documentation.

@ApiBearerAuth.description: Marks an endpoint as requiring Bearer token authentication in Swagger.

NestFactory.signature: class NestFactory { static create(module: any, options?: NestApplicationOptions): Promise<INestApplication>; static createMicroservice(module: any, options?: MicroserviceOptions): Promise<INestMicroservice>; }
NestFactory.description: Factory class to create NestJS application and microservice instances.

INestApplication.description: Interface for the NestJS HTTP application instance. Provides methods like listen(), use(), useGlobalPipes(), enableCors(), etc.

ModuleRef.description: Provides access to the internal provider container for dynamic provider resolution. Methods: get(), resolve(), create().

Reflector.signature: class Reflector { get<T>(metadataKey: any, target: Function): T; getAllAndOverride<T>(metadataKey: any, targets: Function[]): T; getAllAndMerge<T>(metadataKey: any, targets: Function[]): T; }
Reflector.description: Helper class to retrieve metadata set via @SetMetadata(). Used in guards and interceptors.

ConfigModule.signature: class ConfigModule { static forRoot(options?: ConfigModuleOptions): DynamicModule; }
ConfigModule.description: Module for loading environment variables and configuration. Provides ConfigService for accessing values.

ConfigService.signature: class ConfigService { get<T>(propertyPath: string, defaultValue?: T): T | undefined; getOrThrow<T>(propertyPath: string): T; }
ConfigService.description: Service to access configuration values loaded by ConfigModule.

TypeOrmModule.signature: class TypeOrmModule { static forRoot(options?: TypeOrmModuleOptions): DynamicModule; static forFeature(entities: EntityClassOrSchema[]): DynamicModule; }
TypeOrmModule.description: Module for integrating TypeORM with NestJS. Provides forRoot() for connection and forFeature() for repositories.

MongooseModule.signature: class MongooseModule { static forRoot(uri: string, options?: MongooseModuleOptions): DynamicModule; static forFeature(models: ModelDefinition[]): DynamicModule; }
MongooseModule.description: Module for integrating Mongoose ODM with NestJS.

JwtModule.signature: class JwtModule { static register(options: JwtModuleOptions): DynamicModule; static registerAsync(options: JwtModuleAsyncOptions): DynamicModule; }
JwtModule.description: Module for JWT token generation and verification.

PassportModule.signature: class PassportModule { static register(options?: AuthModuleOptions): DynamicModule; }
PassportModule.description: Module for integrating Passport.js authentication strategies.

ThrottlerModule.signature: class ThrottlerModule { static forRoot(options?: ThrottlerModuleOptions): DynamicModule; }
ThrottlerModule.description: Rate limiting module to protect endpoints from brute-force attacks.

CacheModule.signature: class CacheModule { static register(options?: CacheModuleOptions): DynamicModule; }
CacheModule.description: Module for caching responses. Supports in-memory and external stores.

ScheduleModule.description: Module for task scheduling using cron jobs, intervals, and timeouts.

BullModule.signature: class BullModule { static forRoot(options?: BullRootModuleOptions): DynamicModule; static registerQueue(...options: BullModuleOptions[]): DynamicModule; }
BullModule.description: Module for queue management using Bull and Redis for background job processing.

EventEmitterModule.signature: class EventEmitterModule { static forRoot(options?: EventEmitterModuleOptions): DynamicModule; }
EventEmitterModule.description: Module for event-driven architecture using Node.js EventEmitter.

ServeStaticModule.signature: class ServeStaticModule { static forRoot(...options: ServeStaticModuleOptions[]): DynamicModule; }
ServeStaticModule.description: Module for serving static files from a directory.

GraphQLModule.signature: class GraphQLModule { static forRoot<T>(options: T): DynamicModule; }
GraphQLModule.description: Module for integrating GraphQL. Supports code-first and schema-first approaches.

ValidationPipe.description: Pipe that validates incoming data using class-validator decorators. Supports whitelist, transform, and forbidNonWhitelisted options.

ParseIntPipe.description: Pipe that transforms a string parameter into an integer. Throws BadRequestException on failure.

ParseBoolPipe.description: Pipe that transforms a string parameter into a boolean.

ParseArrayPipe.description: Pipe that parses and validates arrays with optional item type validation.

ParseUUIDPipe.description: Pipe that validates and parses UUID parameters.

ParseEnumPipe.description: Pipe that validates a parameter is a valid enum value.

DefaultValuePipe.description: Pipe that provides a default value when the parameter is null or undefined.

ParseFloatPipe.description: Pipe that transforms a string parameter into a floating-point number.

AuthGuard.description: Guard factory that triggers Passport authentication for a given strategy.

ClassSerializerInterceptor.description: Interceptor that serializes response objects using class-transformer decorators (@Exclude, @Expose).

CacheInterceptor.description: Interceptor that automatically caches GET responses. Works with CacheModule.

FileInterceptor.signature: function FileInterceptor(fieldName: string, localOptions?: MulterOptions): Type<NestInterceptor>
FileInterceptor.description: Interceptor for handling single file uploads via multipart/form-data using Multer.

FilesInterceptor.signature: function FilesInterceptor(fieldName: string, maxCount?: number, localOptions?: MulterOptions): Type<NestInterceptor>
FilesInterceptor.description: Interceptor for handling multiple file uploads via multipart/form-data using Multer.

HttpException.signature: class HttpException extends Error { constructor(response: string | Record<string, any>, status: number, options?: HttpExceptionOptions); getStatus(): number; getResponse(): string | object; }
HttpException.description: Base class for all HTTP exceptions. Accepts a response body and status code.

BadRequestException.description: Throws a 400 Bad Request HTTP exception.

NotFoundException.description: Throws a 404 Not Found HTTP exception.

InternalServerErrorException.description: Throws a 500 Internal Server Error HTTP exception.

HttpStatus.signature: enum HttpStatus { OK = 200, CREATED = 201, BAD_REQUEST = 400, UNAUTHORIZED = 401, FORBIDDEN = 403, NOT_FOUND = 404, ... }
HttpStatus.description: Enum of standard HTTP status codes.

Logger.signature: class Logger { log(message: any, context?: string): void; error(message: any, trace?: string, context?: string): void; warn(message: any, context?: string): void; debug(message: any, context?: string): void; verbose(message: any, context?: string): void; }
Logger.description: Built-in NestJS logger service with multiple log levels.

ExecutionContext.signature: interface ExecutionContext extends ArgumentsHost { getClass<T>(): Type<T>; getHandler(): Function; }
ExecutionContext.description: Extends ArgumentsHost with helper methods to determine the current handler and class being invoked.

ArgumentsHost.signature: interface ArgumentsHost { switchToHttp(): HttpArgumentsHost; switchToWs(): WsArgumentsHost; switchToRpc(): RpcArgumentsHost; getType(): string; }
ArgumentsHost.description: Provides methods to retrieve arguments for HTTP, WebSocket, or RPC contexts.

Test.createTestingModule.description: Creates a testing module builder for unit and integration tests.

TestingModule.signature: class TestingModule extends NestApplicationContext { get<T>(typeOrToken: Type<T> | string | symbol): T; resolve<T>(typeOrToken: Type<T> | string | symbol): Promise<T>; createNestApplication(): INestApplication; }
TestingModule.description: Compiled testing module that provides get() and resolve() for retrieving providers.

DynamicModule.signature: interface DynamicModule extends ModuleMetadata { module: Type<any>; global?: boolean; }
DynamicModule.description: Interface returned by static methods like forRoot() and forRootAsync() for dynamic module registration.

JwtService.signature: class JwtService { sign(payload: string | object | Buffer, options?: JwtSignOptions): string; signAsync(payload: string | object | Buffer, options?: JwtSignOptions): Promise<string>; verify<T>(token: string, options?: JwtVerifyOptions): T; }
JwtService.description: Service for signing and verifying JWT tokens.

ThrottlerGuard.description: Guard that limits request rates based on ThrottlerModule configuration.

Transport.signature: enum Transport { TCP, REDIS, NATS, MQTT, GRPC, RMQ, KAFKA }

ClientProxy.signature: abstract class ClientProxy { send<TResult, TInput>(pattern: any, data: TInput): Observable<TResult>; emit<TResult, TInput>(pattern: any, data: TInput): Observable<TResult>; }
ClientProxy.description: Proxy class for sending messages to other microservices.

ClientsModule.signature: class ClientsModule { static register(options: ClientsModuleOptions[]): DynamicModule; static registerAsync(options: ClientsModuleAsyncOptions[]): DynamicModule; }
ClientsModule.description: Module for registering microservice client connections.

DocumentBuilder.signature: class DocumentBuilder { setTitle(title: string): this; setDescription(description: string): this; setVersion(version: string): this; addBearerAuth(): this; build(): OpenAPIObject; }
DocumentBuilder.description: Builder class for creating Swagger/OpenAPI document configuration.

SwaggerModule.signature: class SwaggerModule { static createDocument(app: INestApplication, config: OpenAPIObject): OpenAPIObject; static setup(path: string, app: INestApplication, document: OpenAPIObject): void; }
SwaggerModule.description: Module for setting up Swagger UI documentation endpoint.

VersioningType.signature: enum VersioningType { URI, HEADER, MEDIA_TYPE, CUSTOM }

HttpModule.signature: class HttpModule { static register(config?: HttpModuleOptions): DynamicModule; }
HttpModule.description: Module that exposes HttpService for making external HTTP requests via Axios.

HttpService.signature: class HttpService { get<T>(url: string, config?: AxiosRequestConfig): Observable<AxiosResponse<T>>; post<T>(url: string, data?: any, config?: AxiosRequestConfig): Observable<AxiosResponse<T>>; }
HttpService.description: Service for making HTTP requests using Axios.

ParseFilePipe.description: Pipe for validating file uploads with validators like MaxFileSizeValidator and FileTypeValidator.
